title: Here are the major earnings before the open Wednesday
content:
Major earnings expected before the bell on Wednesday include:

 	* Tencent Holdings Limited (TCEHY [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TCEHY])
 	* Macy's (M [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/M])
 	* General Mills (GIS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GIS])
 	* Hello Group (MOMO [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MOMO])
 	* Jabil (JBL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/JBL])

Other earnings slated for release before Wednesday's open include:

 	* HTHT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/HTHT], LFWD [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/LFWD], NEON [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/NEON], NSPR [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/NSPR], OSS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/OSS], PLX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/PLX], SAIL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SAIL], SPIR [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SPIR], TGEN [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TGEN], WB [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/WB], WSM [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/WSM], XOMA [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/XOMA] 
 	* For Seeking Alpha's full earnings season calendar, click here [https://seekingalpha.com/earnings/earnings-calendar].
